name: urmanga
description: A personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins — small, opinionated tools built for daily use.

plugins.name: delegation
plugins.description: Push work onto Cursor composers and keep your own limits for thinking. Research scouts, a gated code writer on an isolated branch, and a parallel pool for bulk mechanical edits — all accepted by observable effect, never by the agent's own word.

plugins.name: ditto
plugins.description: Social posts in your own voice — blog, studio, personal account, anything: setup captures a style passport from your real posts plus your platforms, then any piece of news becomes a set of posts tailored per platform.
